title: Unify pending approval counts
flag: [SEMANTIC CRITIC · CONSOLIDATE · conf=high] units=['asset-hub:pending_approval', 'inventory:pending_approval'] · CONFUSION: Technicians see two separate 'Pending approval' numbers and wonder if they refer to the same set of items.
should_be: Create a single approvals dashboard; surface the combined count and provide filters for assets vs inventory. (canonical_home=asset-hub.html). Human disposes; if confidence<high VERIFY same-derivation first.

title: Distinguish PM due vs task due
flag: [SEMANTIC CRITIC · RELABEL · conf=high] units=['pm-scheduler:due_soon', 'dayplanner:week_count'] · CONFUSION: Both tiles read 'Due this week', causing techs to mix up preventive maintenance jobs with daily tasks.
should_be: Rename pm-scheduler:due_soon to 'PMs due this week' and dayplanner:week_count to 'Tasks due this week'. (canonical_home=n/a). Human disposes; if confidence<high VERIFY same-derivation first.

title: Clarify shift risk vs system alerts
flag: [SEMANTIC CRITIC · RELABEL · conf=medium] units=['shift-brain:top_risk_this_shift', 'alert-hub:high_severity_alerts'] · CONFUSION: Both tiles use risk language; users may think a shift‑risk entry is the same as a high‑severity system alert.
should_be: Rename shift-brain:top_risk_this_shift to 'Shift‑specific top risk' and keep alert-hub label as 'System high‑severity alerts'. (canonical_home=n/a). Human disposes; if confidence<high VERIFY same-derivation first.

title: Differentiate asset risk categories
flag: [SEMANTIC CRITIC · RELABEL · conf=medium] units=['asset-hub:critical_assets', 'predictive:hot_assets'] · CONFUSION: Both show 'critical/hot' assets, leading supervisors to think they are the same list.
should_be: Rename asset-hub:critical_assets to 'AMC‑flagged critical assets' and predictive:hot_assets to 'Forecasted hot assets'. (canonical_home=n/a). Human disposes; if confidence<high VERIFY same-derivation first.

title: Eliminate marketplace UI state tile
flag: [SEMANTIC CRITIC · REMOVE · conf=high] units=['marketplace:current_tab'] · CONFUSION: The 'Current tab' tile shows UI navigation state, which adds no operational value and confuses users about its purpose.
should_be: Delete this tile; UI should indicate active tab visually. (canonical_home=n/a). Human disposes; if confidence<high VERIFY same-derivation first.

title: Deduplicate marketplace listings view
flag: [SEMANTIC CRITIC · REMOVE · conf=high] units=['marketplace:listing_grid'] · CONFUSION: Both 'Listings in view' and 'Marketplace listing grid' display the same set of listings, causing double counting.
should_be: Keep one tile (e.g., 'Listings in view') and remove the duplicate grid tile. (canonical_home=n/a). Human disposes; if confidence<high VERIFY same-derivation first.
